query:
SELECT id, guestName, paymentStatus, totalAmount, paymentDate, stripeSessionId, createdAt
FROM bookings
WHERE paymentStatus = 'paid'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, guestName, paymentStatus, totalAmount, paymentDate, stripeSessionId, createdAt
FROM bookings
WHERE paymentStatus = 'paid'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
